name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter - Marseille Soap Scented 10l
shortDescription: Proline Bentonite Clumping Marseille Soap Scented Cat Litter , 100% natural bentonite cat litter instantly clumps. Excellent pelletising, instantly lumps Neutralises odour with fresh Marseille Soap scent Non-toxic and 100% natural Thin grain shape Prevents bacterial growth Upon first use, we recommend adding new cat litter to the surface of the old cat litter for a few days.
